title: LLM Prompt Engineering Cheatsheet
description: Self-contained HTML reference card covering chain-of-thought, few-shot, role prompting, structured output, and tool-use patterns with before/after examples for GPT-4o, Claude, and Gemini.

title: AI Agent Prompt Pack -- 100 System Prompts
description: 100 battle-tested system prompts organized by category: coding assistants, research agents, content writers, data analysts, customer support bots, and autonomous task runners. JSON format, ready for direct use in any framework.

title: Python FastAPI Starter Pack
description: Production-ready FastAPI scaffold: async endpoints, Pydantic v2 schemas, SQLAlchemy 2.0 async ORM, JWT auth, pytest fixtures, Docker + docker-compose, and GitHub Actions CI. Copy-paste and go.

title: Claude Code Power User Guide
description: Comprehensive tutorial covering Claude Code slash commands, custom CLAUDE.md setup, multi-agent workflows, and real-world project examples. Targets developers new to agentic coding.
